concerns: WorkflowTemplateEditor consumes the already-populated shared skill catalog/store and intentionally does not call fetchSkillDetail or fetch skill file contents.
The editor does not auto-fetch the catalog on mount to avoid unmocked API calls in existing component tests; T007 store support remains the catalog source.
recovery_hints: If a future flow needs guaranteed catalog population before opening the editor, load useSkillStore().fetchCatalog() in the owning settings/manager surface rather than fetching skill contents from the editor.
Existing reference objects are preserved by skill name when saving; changing names in the legacy advanced textarea intentionally creates a new names-first recommended reference.
